system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.

{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      controlDict;
}

application     pimpleFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         0.3;

deltaT          0.0001;

adjustTimeStep  yes;

maxCo           0.5;

maxDeltaT       0.0001;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.01;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    p
    {
        solver          GAMG;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.01;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
    }

    pFinal
    {
        $p;
        relTol          0;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)"
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        symGaussSeidel;
        tolerance       1e-06;
        relTol          0.1;
    }

    "(U|k|epsilon|nuTilda)Final"
    {
        $U;
        relTol          0;
    }
}

PIMPLE
{
    nOuterCorrectors    1;
    nCorrectors         2;
    nNonOrthogonalCorrectors 0;
    pRefCell            0;
    pRefValue           0;
}

relaxationFactors
{
    equations
    {
        ".*"            0.7;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
    grad(p)         Gauss linear;
    grad(U)         cellLimited Gauss linear 1;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi)        Gauss upwind;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss upwind;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

wallDist
{
    method          meshWave;
}

keyword div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) is undefined in dictionary "/pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_B_20260516_194747_run2/runs/pitzDaily/3/system/fvSchemes/divSchemes"

file: /pscratch/sd/p/peijingx/troubleshoot/benchmark_grouping_B_20260516_194747_run2/runs/pitzDaily/3/system/fvSchemes/divSchemes from line 24 to line 29.

    in file db/dictionary/dictionary.C at line 831.

FOAM exiting'}]</error_logs>
<reviewer_analysis>## Error Diagnosis

The error is:

```
keyword div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) is undefined in dictionary ".../system/fvSchemes/divSchemes"
```

This is the same error from Attempt 6, meaning the `div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U)))))` entry is STILL not being found in `divSchemes`. Looking at the current files provided, I need to re-examine them carefully.

Looking at the current `fvSchemes`:

```
divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi)        Gauss upwind;
}
```

The `div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U)))))` entry is **missing from `divSchemes`**. It was removed in Attempt 6 and placed in `laplacianSchemes`, but the current file does not show it anywhere. Meanwhile, `laplacianSchemes` contains:

```
laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss upwind;
}
```

**The problem:** In OpenFOAM 10's `pimpleFoam`, the solver looks for the divergence scheme `div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U)))))` specifically in the `divSchemes` sub-dictionary, not in `laplacianSchemes`. The `laplacianSchemes` section is only consulted for Laplacian-type operators, not for divergence terms in the momentum equation.

## Solution

The `div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U)))))` divergence scheme entry **MUST be present in `divSchemes`** for OpenFOAM 10's `pimpleFoam` to find it. The previous attempt incorrectly moved it to `laplacianSchemes`. Add it back to `divSchemes`:

### `system/fvSchemes` — `divSchemes` sub-dictionary

Add the entry:
```
div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss upwind;
```

So the complete `divSchemes` should be:

```
divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(phi,U)      Gauss upwind;
    div(phi,k)      Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,epsilon) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi,nuTilda) Gauss limitedLinear 1;
    div(phi)        Gauss upwind;
    div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss upwind;
}
```

No other files need modification. The `laplacianSchemes` entry can remain there as well (it won't hurt), but the critical fix is having the scheme in `divSchemes` where the solver expects to find it.

## Summary

| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `system/fvSchemes` | Add `div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss upwind;` to the `divSchemes` sub-dictionary |

This is the exact entry that the error log reports as "undefined". Previous attempts either omitted it or misplaced it to `laplacianSchemes`. In OpenFOAM 10's `pimpleFoam`, this divergence scheme must reside in `divSchemes` for the momentum equation's viscous stress computation to work.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/fvSchemes', 'changes': 'Add div((nuEff*dev2(T(grad(U))))) Gauss upwind; entry to the divSchemes sub-dictionary'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a Reynolds-Averaged Simulation (RAS) pitzdaily simulation. Use PIMPLE algorithm. The domain is a 2D millimeter-scale channel geometry. Boundary conditions specify a fixed velocity of 15m/s at the inlet (left),zero gradient pressure at the outlet (right), and no-slip conditions for walls. Use timestep of 0.0001 and output every 0.01. Finaltime is 0.3. use nu value of 1e-04.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
